parameters.description: Filter all tiles by current weather condition

queries.text:
geo_station_hotspots
| where isempty(selectedNeighbourhood) or selectedNeighbourhood == "All" or neighbourhood == selectedNeighbourhood
| project station_id, street_address, neighbourhood, 
    latitude, longitude, utilization_pct, 
    Gi_Bin, hotspot_label, zone_action
| extend utilization_display = round(utilization_pct * 100, 1)

let current_weather = 
    weather_events_clean
    | where todatetime(observation_time) between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | summarize arg_max(todatetime(observation_time), temperature_c, has_precipitation, weather_description);
geo_neighbourhood_zones
| where isempty(selectedNeighbourhood) or selectedNeighbourhood == "All" or neighbourhood == selectedNeighbourhood
| extend current_temp = toscalar(current_weather | project temperature_c)
| extend current_precip = toscalar(current_weather | project has_precipitation)
| extend weather_impact = case(
    current_precip and avg_utilization < 0.3,
        strcat("⚠️ ", tostring(round(current_temp, 1)), "°C + Rain — expect oversupply"),
    current_temp < 10 and avg_utilization < 0.3,
        strcat("🥶 ", tostring(round(current_temp, 1)), "°C — cold suppressing demand"),
    current_temp > 15 and avg_utilization > 0.7,
        strcat("🔥 ", tostring(round(current_temp, 1)), "°C — warm driving high demand"),
    current_precip,
        strcat("🌧️ ", tostring(round(current_temp, 1)), "°C + Rain — monitor for demand shifts"),
    current_temp < 10,
        strcat("❄️ ", tostring(round(current_temp, 1)), "°C — demand may be lower than normal"),
    current_temp > 15,
        strcat("☀️ ", tostring(round(current_temp, 1)), "°C — demand may be higher than normal"),
    strcat("✅ ", tostring(round(current_temp, 1)), "°C — normal conditions")
)
| project neighbourhood, station_count, 
    avg_utilization = round(avg_utilization * 100, 1),
    hot_spot_count, cold_spot_count, 
    zone_risk, recommended_action, weather_impact
| order by avg_utilization desc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| summarize total_bikes = sum(No_Bikes), total_empty = sum(No_Empty_Docks)
| extend pct = round(100.0 * total_bikes / (total_bikes + total_empty), 1)
| extend status = case(pct >= 70, "🟢", pct >= 40, "🟡", "🔴")
| extend fleet_utilization = strcat(status, " ", tostring(pct), "%")
| project fleet_utilization

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization = iff(total == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total), 1))
| where utilization < 30
| count
| extend icon = iff(Count > 0, "🔴", "🟢")
| extend display = strcat(icon, " ", tostring(Count))
| project display

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| summarize total_bikes = sum(No_Bikes)
| extend bikes_out = strcat("⚡ ", tostring(total_bikes))
| project bikes_out

weather_events_clean
| summarize arg_max(observation_time, temperature_c, weather_description, has_precipitation)
| extend icon = case(has_precipitation, "🌧️", temperature_c > 20, "☀️", temperature_c > 10, "⛅", "🥶")
| extend weather_now = strcat(icon, " ", tostring(toint(temperature_c)), "°C ", weather_description)
| project weather_now

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization = round(100.0 * No_Bikes / total_docks, 1)
| extend status = case(utilization < 5, "🔴 CRITICAL", utilization < 10, "🟡 LOW", utilization > 95, "🔵 CRITICAL-FULL", utilization > 90, "🟡 HIGH", "🟢 OK")
| project Street, Neighbourhood, No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks, utilization, status
| order by utilization asc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
weather_events_clean
| summarize arg_max(observation_time, has_precipitation, temperature_c) by time_bin = bin(todatetime(observation_time), 1h)
| join kind=leftouter (
    bikerentaldb
    | where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
    | summarize avg_bikes = avg(todouble(No_Bikes)) by time_bin = bin(ingestion_time(), 1h)
) on time_bin
| project hour = time_bin, has_precipitation, temperature_c, avg_bikes = round(coalesce(avg_bikes, 0.0), 1)
| order by hour asc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
weather_events_clean
| summarize arg_max(observation_time, wind_gust_kmh, wind_direction_desc) by time_bin = bin(todatetime(observation_time), 1h)
| join kind=inner (
    bikerentaldb
    | where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
    | summarize avg_empty = avg(todouble(No_Empty_Docks)) by time_bin = bin(ingestion_time(), 1h)
) on time_bin
| project hour = time_bin, wind_gust_kmh, wind_direction_desc, avg_empty_docks = round(avg_empty, 1)
| order by hour asc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
let filterWeather = selectedWeather;
weather_events_clean
| where filterWeather == "" or weather_description == filterWeather
| summarize arg_max(observation_time, weather_description) by time_bin = bin(todatetime(observation_time), 1h)
| join kind=inner (
    bikerentaldb
    | where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
    | extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
    | extend utilization = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * No_Bikes / total_docks, 1))
    | summarize avg_bikes = avg(No_Bikes), avg_utilization = avg(utilization) by time_bin = bin(ingestion_time(), 1h)
) on time_bin
| summarize avg_bikes = round(avg(avg_bikes), 1), avg_utilization = round(avg(avg_utilization), 1), hours_observed = count() by weather_description
| order by avg_bikes desc

let filterWeather = selectedWeather;
weather_events_clean
| where filterWeather == "" or weather_description == filterWeather
| extend comfort_index = case(
    temperature_c between (8.0 .. 18.0) and relative_humidity < 70 and wind_gust_kmh < 30 and not(has_precipitation), "Excellent",
    temperature_c between (3.0 .. 22.0) and relative_humidity < 80 and wind_gust_kmh < 40, "Good",
    temperature_c between (0.0 .. 28.0) and wind_gust_kmh < 50, "Fair",
    "Poor")
| extend comfort_score = case(
    comfort_index == "Excellent", 4,
    comfort_index == "Good", 3,
    comfort_index == "Fair", 2, 1)
| summarize avg_score = round(avg(comfort_score), 2), latest_comfort = take_any(comfort_index)
  by time_bin = bin(todatetime(observation_time), 30m)
| project time_bin, avg_score, latest_comfort
| order by time_bin asc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
let is_rain = toscalar(weather_events_clean | summarize arg_max(observation_time, has_precipitation) | project has_precipitation);
let is_windy = toscalar(weather_events_clean | summarize arg_max(observation_time, wind_gust_kmh) | project wind_gust_kmh) > 40;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization = round(100.0 * No_Bikes / total_docks, 1)
| extend threshold_low = case(is_rain, 5, is_windy, 8, 10)
| extend threshold_high = case(is_rain, 95, is_windy, 92, 90)
| where utilization < threshold_low or utilization > threshold_high
| extend action = iff(utilization < threshold_low, strcat("ADD ", tostring(toint(total_docks * 0.3 - No_Bikes)), " bikes"), strcat("REMOVE ", tostring(toint(No_Bikes - total_docks * 0.7)), " bikes"))
| extend priority = case(utilization < 5 or utilization > 95, "🔴 NOW", "🟡 SOON")
| project priority, Street, Neighbourhood, No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks, utilization, action
| order by priority asc, utilization asc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| summarize total_bikes = sum(No_Bikes), total_empty = sum(No_Empty_Docks), stations = dcount(BikepointID) by Neighbourhood
| extend utilization = round(100.0 * total_bikes / (total_bikes + total_empty), 1)
| order by utilization desc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize avg_bikes = round(avg(No_Bikes), 1), avg_empty = round(avg(No_Empty_Docks), 1) by bin(ingestion_time(), 5m)
| order by ingestion_time() asc

geo_rebalancing_routes
| project deficit_street, deficit_neighbourhood, surplus_street,
    surplus_neighbourhood, distance_km, bikes_to_move, route_priority
| order by distance_km asc

let current_weather = 
    weather_events_clean
    | where todatetime(observation_time) between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | summarize arg_max(todatetime(observation_time), temperature_c, has_precipitation, weather_description);
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(selectedNeighbourhood) or selectedNeighbourhood == "All" or Neighbourhood == selectedNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total_docks = todouble(No_Bikes) + todouble(No_Empty_Docks)
| extend utilization = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / total_docks)
| extend action = case(
    utilization > 0.85, "🔴 REMOVE bikes",
    utilization < 0.15, "🔵 ADD bikes",
    "🟢 No action")
| where utilization > 0.85 or utilization < 0.15
| extend current_temp = toscalar(current_weather | project temperature_c)
| extend current_precip = toscalar(current_weather | project has_precipitation)
| extend weather_risk = case(
    current_precip == true, "🌧️ Rain — expect demand drop",
    current_temp < 10, "🥶 Cold — expect demand drop",
    current_temp > 15, "☀️ Warm — expect demand surge",
    strcat("🟢 ", tostring(current_temp), "°C — no weather impact"))
| extend priority = case(
    (utilization > 0.95 or utilization < 0.05), "🚨 CRITICAL",
    "⚠️ HIGH")
| project priority, BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood, 
    No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks, 
    utilization = round(utilization * 100, 1), action, weather_risk
| order by utilization desc

let current_weather = 
    weather_events_clean
    | where todatetime(observation_time) between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | summarize arg_max(todatetime(observation_time), temperature_c, has_precipitation, weather_description);
let global_avg = toscalar(
    bikerentaldb
    | where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | where isempty(selectedNeighbourhood) or selectedNeighbourhood == "All" or Neighbourhood == selectedNeighbourhood
    | extend total_docks = todouble(No_Bikes) + todouble(No_Empty_Docks)
    | summarize avg(iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / total_docks))
);
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(selectedNeighbourhood) or selectedNeighbourhood == "All" or Neighbourhood == selectedNeighbourhood
| extend total_docks = todouble(No_Bikes) + todouble(No_Empty_Docks)
| extend utilization = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / total_docks)
| summarize avg_util = avg(utilization), stdev_util = stdev(utilization) by BikepointID, Neighbourhood
| where isnotnull(stdev_util) and stdev_util > 0
| extend z_score = round((avg_util - global_avg) / stdev_util, 2)
| where z_score > 2 or z_score < -2
| extend anomaly_type = iff(z_score > 0, "📈 HIGH demand", "📉 LOW demand")
| extend current_temp = toscalar(current_weather | project temperature_c)
| extend current_precip = toscalar(current_weather | project has_precipitation)
| extend weather_context = case(
    current_precip == true and z_score < -2, "🌧️ Rain likely causing low demand",
    current_temp < 10 and z_score < -2, "🥶 Cold likely causing low demand",
    current_temp > 15 and z_score > 2, "☀️ Warm weather driving high demand",
    current_precip == true, strcat("🌧️ Rain — but anomaly is unusual"),
    strcat("🟢 ", tostring(current_temp), "°C — anomaly NOT weather-related"))
| project BikepointID, Neighbourhood, avg_util = round(avg_util * 100, 1), z_score, anomaly_type, weather_context
| order by z_score desc

let sla_hourly =
    bikerentaldb
    | where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | where isempty(selectedNeighbourhood) or selectedNeighbourhood == "All" or Neighbourhood == selectedNeighbourhood
    | extend time_bin = bin(ingestion_time(), 15m)
    | extend total_docks = todouble(No_Bikes) + todouble(No_Empty_Docks)
    | extend utilization = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / total_docks)
    | extend meets_sla = iff(utilization between (0.1 .. 0.9), 1.0, 0.0)
    | summarize sla_pct = round(avg(meets_sla) * 100, 1) by time_bin;
let weather_hourly =
    weather_events_clean
    | extend obs_time = todatetime(observation_time)
    | where obs_time between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | extend time_bin = bin(obs_time, 15m)
    | summarize avg_temp = round(avg(temperature_c), 1) by time_bin;
sla_hourly
| join kind=leftouter weather_hourly on time_bin
| extend avg_temp = coalesce(avg_temp, 0.0)
| project time_bin, sla_pct, avg_temp
| order by time_bin asc

let filterWeather = selectedWeather;
weather_events_clean
| where filterWeather == "" or weather_description == filterWeather
| summarize arg_max(observation_time, *) by location_name
| project observation_time, location_name, weather_description, temperature_c, feels_like_c, relative_humidity, has_precipitation, wind_gust_kmh, wind_direction_desc, uv_index

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| summarize total_bikes = sum(No_Bikes), total_docks = sum(No_Empty_Docks), stations = dcount(BikepointID)
| extend total_capacity = total_bikes + total_docks
| extend fleet_utilization = round(100.0 * total_bikes / total_capacity, 1)
| project total_bikes, total_docks, total_capacity, stations, fleet_utilization

bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend total_docks = todouble(No_Bikes) + todouble(No_Empty_Docks)
| extend utilization = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / total_docks)
| where utilization > 0.9 or utilization < 0.1
| summarize alert_count = dcount(BikepointID)

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, 100.0 * todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total_docks))
| extend alert_level = case(
    utilization > 95 or utilization < 5, "critical",
    utilization > 90 or utilization < 10, "warning",
    "ok")
| where alert_level != "ok"
| summarize critical = countif(alert_level == "critical"), warning = countif(alert_level == "warning")
| extend total_alerts = critical + warning

let temp_data = 
    weather_events_clean
    | extend obs_time = todatetime(observation_time)
    | where obs_time between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | extend time_bin = bin(obs_time, 1h)
    | summarize avg_temp = round(avg(temperature_c), 1) by time_bin;
let bike_data = 
    bikerentaldb
    | where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
    | extend time_bin = bin(ingestion_time(), 1h)
    | extend total_docks = todouble(No_Bikes) + todouble(No_Empty_Docks)
    | summarize avg_utilization = round(avg(iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / total_docks)) * 100, 1) by time_bin;
temp_data
| join kind=inner bike_data on time_bin
| project time_bin, avg_temp, avg_utilization
| order by time_bin asc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| summarize 
    total_bikes = sum(No_Bikes), 
    total_empty = sum(No_Empty_Docks), 
    stations = dcount(BikepointID),
    latitude = avg(Latitude),
    longitude = avg(Longitude)
    by Neighbourhood
| extend utilization = round(100.0 * todouble(total_bikes) / todouble(total_bikes + total_empty), 1)
| order by utilization desc

bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend total_docks = todouble(No_Bikes) + todouble(No_Empty_Docks)
| extend utilization = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / total_docks)
| extend is_available = iff(utilization between (0.1 .. 0.9), 1, 0)
| summarize availability_pct = round(avg(todouble(is_available)) * 100, 1)

bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total_docks = todouble(No_Bikes) + todouble(No_Empty_Docks)
| extend utilization = round(iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / total_docks) * 100, 1)
| extend status = case(
    utilization > 90, "🔴 FULL",
    utilization < 10, "🔵 EMPTY",
    utilization > 75, "🟠 HIGH",
    utilization < 25, "🟡 LOW",
    "🟢 OK")
| project BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood, No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks, utilization, status
| order by utilization desc

bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend total_docks = todouble(No_Bikes) + todouble(No_Empty_Docks)
| extend utilization = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / total_docks)
| summarize avg_utilization = round(avg(utilization) * 100, 1) by Neighbourhood
| top 15 by avg_utilization desc
| order by avg_utilization desc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| summarize total_bikes = sum(No_Bikes), total_empty = sum(No_Empty_Docks)
| extend pct = round(100.0 * total_bikes / (total_bikes + total_empty), 1)
| extend status = case(pct >= 70, "🟢", pct >= 40, "🟡", "🔴")
| extend fleet_utilization = strcat(status, " ", tostring(pct), "%")
| project fleet_utilization

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization = iff(total == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total), 1))
| where utilization < 30
| count
| extend icon = iff(Count > 0, "🔴", "🟢")
| extend display = strcat(icon, " ", tostring(Count))
| project display

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| summarize total_bikes = sum(No_Bikes)
| extend bikes_out = strcat("⚡ ", tostring(total_bikes))
| project bikes_out

weather_events_clean
| summarize arg_max(observation_time, temperature_c, weather_description, has_precipitation)
| extend icon = case(has_precipitation, "🌧️", temperature_c > 20, "☀️", temperature_c > 10, "⛅", "🥶")
| extend weather_now = strcat(icon, " ", tostring(toint(temperature_c)), "°C ", weather_description)
| project weather_now

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization = round(100.0 * No_Bikes / total_docks, 1)
| extend status = case(utilization < 5, "🔴 CRITICAL", utilization < 10, "🟡 LOW", utilization > 95, "🔵 CRITICAL-FULL", utilization > 90, "🟡 HIGH", "🟢 OK")
| project Street, Neighbourhood, No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks, utilization, status
| order by utilization asc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
let is_rain = toscalar(weather_events_clean | summarize arg_max(observation_time, has_precipitation) | project has_precipitation);
let is_windy = toscalar(weather_events_clean | summarize arg_max(observation_time, wind_gust_kmh) | project wind_gust_kmh) > 40;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization = round(100.0 * No_Bikes / total_docks, 1)
| extend threshold_low = case(is_rain, 5, is_windy, 8, 10)
| extend threshold_high = case(is_rain, 95, is_windy, 92, 90)
| where utilization < threshold_low or utilization > threshold_high
| extend action = iff(utilization < threshold_low, strcat("ADD ", tostring(toint(total_docks * 0.3 - No_Bikes)), " bikes"), strcat("REMOVE ", tostring(toint(No_Bikes - total_docks * 0.7)), " bikes"))
| extend priority = case(utilization < 5 or utilization > 95, "🔴 NOW", "🟡 SOON")
| project priority, Street, Neighbourhood, No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks, utilization, action
| order by priority asc, utilization asc

let filterNeighbourhood = selectedNeighbourhood;
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize avg_bikes = round(avg(No_Bikes), 1), avg_empty = round(avg(No_Empty_Docks), 1) by bin(ingestion_time(), 5m)
| order by ingestion_time() asc

bikerentaldb
| distinct Neighbourhood
| order by Neighbourhood asc

weather_events_clean
| distinct weather_description
| order by weather_description asc
